report.title: 考核信息汇总

option.source: @{Select QTD, QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD }
option.label: QTD_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE where PSTN_TYPE='04' order by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计

report.title: 考核信息汇总

option.source: @{Select QTD, QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD }
option.label: QTD_NM

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计
